route-handler:/.well-known/*slug:apps/we.note: Rust backend route_request handles .well-known catch-all GET/HEAD requests with the legacy cacheable empty 404 response.

route-handler:/~recover-browser-state:ap.note: Rust backend route_request handles GET/POST browser-state recovery with no-store HTML, same-origin POST protection, Clear-Site-Data, redirect, and Supabase auth cookie clearing behavior.

route-handler:/serwist/:path:apps/web/sr.note: Rust backend route_request handles /serwist/sw.js with a no-store decommissioning service worker that unregisters the legacy Serwist registration during Cloudflare cutover, plus deterministic source-map metadata for /serwist/sw.js.map.

api:/api/health:apps/web/src/app/api/hea.note: Rust backend route_request handles GET /api/health with the legacy response body.

api:/api/auth/me/session:apps/web/src/ap.note: Accepted removal: this debug-style endpoint exposes raw sb-* auth cookie values and the full Supabase session payload. No in-repo callers reference /api/auth/me/session, and the TanStack/Rust cutover must not preserve raw session export behavior.

api:/api/share/course/:courseId:apps/web.note: Rust backend route_request owns terminal decommission for the redundant legacy shared-course alias and returns 410 ENDPOINT_REMOVED. The maintained shared-course reader remains GET /api/v1/course?courseId=..., so the duplicate alias is intentionally not preserved for Cloudflare cutover.

api:/api/sync-logs:apps/web/src/app/api/.note: Rust backend route_request owns terminal decommission for the broad legacy all-workspace sync logs API and returns 410 ENDPOINT_REMOVED. Calendar sync monitoring now uses workspace-scoped server-owned data fetching, so the legacy API is intentionally not preserved.

api:/api/payment/migrations/subscription.note: Rust backend route_request owns terminal decommission for the old monolithic subscription cross-check route and returns 410 ENDPOINT_REMOVED. The billing maintenance UI uses the phase-1, phase-2, and phase-3 endpoints, which remain legacy-owned until separately migrated.

api:/api/users/search:apps/web/src/app/a.note: Rust backend route_request owns terminal decommission for the unused legacy unauthenticated user-search RPC wrapper and returns 410 ENDPOINT_REMOVED. Future people search must use a maintained server-owned API instead of preserving this broad public wrapper.

api:/api/v1/calendar/mock:apps/web/src/a.note: Rust backend route_request handles GET /api/v1/calendar/mock with the deterministic legacy mock event payload.

cron:/api/cron/discord/daily-report:apps.note: Rust backend handle_backend_request proxies GET /api/cron/discord/daily-report to DISCORD_APP_DEPLOYMENT_URL/daily-report with cron bearer auth, upstream JSON/status passthrough, and the legacy invalid-JSON fallback.

cron:/api/cron/discord/wol/daily/remind:.note: Rust backend handle_backend_request proxies GET /api/cron/discord/wol/daily/remind to DISCORD_APP_DEPLOYMENT_URL/wol-reminder with cron bearer auth, upstream JSON/status passthrough, and the legacy invalid-JSON fallback.

api:/api/v1/infrastructure/migrate/group.note: Rust backend route_request handles the disabled PUT migration endpoint with the legacy dev-mode guard and 410 MIGRATION_DISABLED response.

api:/api/workspaces/:wsId/products/categ.note: Rust backend route_request owns terminal decommission for the obsolete PUT product category migration endpoint with the development-only guard and 410 MIGRATION_DISABLED response. The legacy Supabase data write is intentionally not preserved for Cloudflare cutover.

api:/api/workspaces/:wsId/products/units.note: Rust backend route_request owns terminal decommission for the obsolete PUT product unit migration endpoint with the development-only guard and 410 MIGRATION_DISABLED response. The legacy private inventory data write is intentionally not preserved for Cloudflare cutover.

api:/api/workspaces/:wsId/transactions/c.note: Rust backend route_request owns terminal decommission for the obsolete PUT transaction category migration endpoint with the development-only guard and 410 MIGRATION_DISABLED response. The legacy Supabase data write is intentionally not preserved for Cloudflare cutover.

api:/api/workspaces/:wsId/users/indicato.note: Rust backend route_request owns terminal decommission for the obsolete PUT user indicator migration endpoint with the development-only guard and 410 MIGRATION_DISABLED response. The legacy Supabase data write is intentionally not preserved for Cloudflare cutover.

Rust backend route_request owns terminal decommission for the obsolete PUT user indicator group migration endpoint with the development-only guard and 410 MIGRATION_DISABLED response. The legacy private RPC write path is intentionally not preserved for Cloudflare cutover.

api:/api/workspaces/:wsId/wallets/migrat.note: Rust backend route_request owns terminal decommission for the obsolete PUT wallet migration endpoint with the development-only guard and 410 MIGRATION_DISABLED response. The legacy private wallet data write is intentionally not preserved for Cloudflare cutover.

api:/api/workspaces/:wsId/wallets/transa.note: Rust backend route_request owns terminal decommission for the obsolete PUT wallet transaction migration endpoint with the development-only guard and 410 MIGRATION_DISABLED response. The legacy finance data write is intentionally not preserved for Cloudflare cutover.

api:/api/v1/infrastructure/languages:app.note: Rust backend route_request handles POST/DELETE locale preference cookie updates with the legacy validation messages and NEXT_LOCALE cookie behavior.

api:/api/v1/infrastructure/sidebar:apps/.note: Rust backend route_request handles POST/DELETE sidebar collapsed preference cookie updates with the legacy validation message and sidebar-collapsed cookie behavior.

api:/api/v1/infrastructure/sidebar/sizes.note: Rust backend route_request handles POST/DELETE sidebar sizing preference cookies, including the legacy DELETE behavior that clears only sidebar-size.

api:/api/v1/infrastructure/users/fields/.note: Rust backend route_request handles GET /api/v1/infrastructure/users/fields/types with the deterministic legacy field type payload and no longer opens a Supabase admin client for static metadata.

api:/api/v1/inquiries:apps/web/src/app/a.note: Rust backend handle_backend_request verifies app-session auth, enforces same-origin mutation confirmation for cookie auth, validates the legacy support inquiry payload, and inserts support_inquiries through the server-owned Supabase REST adapter with creator_id from the resolved app-session user. Adjacent inquiry item and media-url routes remain legacy-owned.

api:/api/v1/users/me/profile:apps/web/sr.note: Rust backend handle_backend_request verifies app-session auth, hydrates users and user_private_details through the server-owned Supabase REST adapter, and persists display_name, bio, and avatar_url profile updates with same-origin mutation protection for cookie auth. This endpoint is migrated for the app-session contract used by TanStack contact; broader Supabase session revalidation remains tracked under auth migration work.

loading:/:locale/:wsId/tasks/boards/:boa.note: TanStack Start route /$locale/$wsId/tasks/boards/$boardId renders the shared KanbanSkeleton from @tuturuuu/ui for the legacy route-level loading artifact. This marks only loading.tsx migrated; the task board page/data/auth route remains legacy-owned.

loading:/:locale/:wsId/users/groups/:gro.note: TanStack Start route /$locale/$wsId/users/groups/$groupId renders a copied local equivalent of the legacy GroupOverviewSkeleton using shared Skeleton primitives. This marks only loading.tsx migrated; the group detail page/data/auth route remains legacy-owned.

loading:/:locale/:wsId/users/reports/:re.note: TanStack Start route /$locale/$wsId/users/reports/$reportId renders the legacy dashed loading panel with Loader2 and localized common.loading text from the TanStack message bundle. This marks only loading.tsx migrated; the report detail page/data/auth route remains legacy-owned.

OPTIONS.note: Rust backend route_request handles the legacy password login CORS preflight with the shared wildcard 204 response. POST remains legacy-owned until password auth/session handling moves behind the Rust backend.

Rust backend route_request handles the legacy mobile password login CORS preflight with the shared wildcard 204 response. POST remains legacy-owned until password auth/session handling moves behind the Rust backend.
Rust backend route_request handles the legacy mobile send OTP CORS preflight with the shared wildcard 204 response. POST remains legacy-owned until OTP send side effects move behind the Rust backend.

Rust backend route_request handles the legacy mobile verify OTP CORS preflight with the shared wildcard 204 response. POST remains legacy-owned until OTP verification and session responses move behind the Rust backend.
Rust backend route_request handles the legacy OTP send CORS preflight with the shared wildcard 204 response. POST remains legacy-owned until OTP send side effects move behind the Rust backend.

Rust backend route_request handles the legacy OTP verify CORS preflight with the shared wildcard 204 response. POST remains legacy-owned until OTP verification and session responses move behind the Rust backend.

Rust backend route_request handles the legacy OTP settings CORS preflight with the shared wildcard 204 response. GET remains legacy-owned until OTP settings lookup and diagnostics move behind the Rust backend.
Rust backend route_request handles the legacy MFA mobile challenge creation bare 204 preflight. POST remains legacy-owned until mobile approval challenge creation moves behind the Rust backend.
Rust backend route_request handles the legacy MFA mobile challenge polling bare 204 preflight. GET remains legacy-owned until mobile approval polling moves behind the Rust backend.
Rust backend route_request handles the legacy MFA mobile challenge approval bare 204 preflight. POST remains legacy-owned until mobile approval completion moves behind the Rust backend.
Rust backend route_request handles the legacy MFA mobile approvals bare 204 preflight. GET remains legacy-owned until approval listing and request log-drain behavior move behind the Rust backend.
Rust backend route_request handles the legacy QR login challenge creation bare 204 preflight. POST remains legacy-owned until QR challenge creation moves behind the Rust backend.
Rust backend route_request handles the legacy QR login challenge polling bare 204 preflight. GET remains legacy-owned until QR challenge polling moves behind the Rust backend.
Rust backend route_request handles the legacy QR login challenge approval bare 204 preflight. POST remains legacy-owned until QR challenge approval moves behind the Rust backend.

GET.note: Rust backend handle_backend_request owns the public mobile version-check GET route with strict platform/version validation, fixed root workspace mobile policy config reads through the server-owned Supabase REST adapter, legacy update-status evaluation, and wildcard CORS JSON responses.

OPTIONS.note: Rust backend route_request handles the legacy mobile version-check CORS preflight with the shared wildcard 204 response; GET is also Rust-owned by the mobile version-check migration.

Rust backend route_request handles the legacy WebGL package upload preflight with origin-dependent credentialed CMS CORS headers. PUT remains legacy-owned until protected upload validation, storage signing, and streaming upload move behind the Rust backend.

api:/api/v1/workspaces/:wsId/user-groups.note: Rust backend route_request handles the removed POST direct group-check email endpoint with the legacy 410 response; emails are sent by the system queue after approval.

api:/api/v1/workspaces/:wsId/slides:apps.note: Rust backend route_request handles GET/POST workspace slides collection placeholders with the legacy 501 Not implemented response.

api:/api/v1/workspaces/:wsId/slides/:sli.note: Rust backend route_request handles PUT/DELETE workspace slide item placeholders with the legacy 501 Not implemented response.

error:/:locale:apps/web/src/app/[locale].note: TanStack Start root route uses LegacyErrorShell as the route error component, preserving the legacy message/reset UI without Next.js client-only boundaries.

not-found:/:locale:apps/web/src/app/[loc.note: TanStack Start root route uses LegacyNotFoundShell as the default not-found component with locale-aware legacy common messages and onboarding link.

layout:/~offline:apps/web/src/app/~offli.note: TanStack Start root document imports the shared UI globals and applies the legacy offline shell body classes for the /~offline fallback.

page:/~offline:apps/web/src/app/~offline.note: TanStack Start route /~offline renders the shared OfflinePage with the legacy title, message, and foreground/background classes.

page:/:locale/docs:apps/web/src/app/[loc.note: TanStack Start route /$locale/docs preserves the legacy 307 external redirect to https://docs.tuturuuu.com.

page:/:locale/calendar/meet-together/*sl.note: TanStack Start routes /$locale/calendar/meet-together and /$locale/calendar/meet-together/$ preserve the legacy redirect to /meet-together with optional trailing slug segments.
